The '''Galacians''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gala]]. Their skin was a distinctive [[Color/Legends|pale bluish]] tone, which they called "moonlight." They were therefore frequently called "moon people."

The Galacians consisted of three separate tribes: the [[city people]], the [[hill people]], and the [[sea people]]. They were ruled by the [[Beju-Tallah dynasty]] until [[44 BBY]] when [[Veda (Galacian)|Queen Veda]] stepped down in favor of a democratically elected leader.

{{Species-stub}}
